official_notes: Old report baseline only; official target side was a clean pass.
Old report assessment: official reviewer gave the resume substantial credit for semantic evidence and transferability.
claude_notes: Mostly medium and low suggestions only on the target JD.

metadata.label: same/Amazon
metadata.title: Machine Learning Engineer II , AGI Customization
metadata.team_direction: Amazon is seeking a passionate and talented Software Development Engineer for their Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) team to develop customization capabilities for Large Language Models

official_notes: Old report baseline only; official target side was a clean pass.
Old report assessment: official reviewer gave the resume substantial credit for semantic evidence and transferability.
claude_notes: Mostly medium and low suggestions only on the target JD.

findings.issue: 首句先写“Backend-leaning ML Engineer”再写“transitioning from analytics”，首屏第一眼会被读成转型叙事而不是稳定的 ML/LLM 方向定位。
findings.fix: 把首句改成直接的角色锚点 + 领域锚点，例如“ML/Backend Engineer building LLM customization and retrieval systems”，把转型背景放到后句或删除。

findings.issue: 可见的非实习经历只有 Temu 和 DiDi，合计约 2.5 年，低于 JD 明写的 3+ years non-internship professional software development experience；这会在硬门槛筛选直接触发拒点。
findings.fix: [结构性错配] 这条硬门槛无法靠措辞补齐。若继续投递，简历应保持“2.5+ years”这一真实表述，不要暗示已满足 3 年；更合理的做法是把该版本用于无 3+ 年硬门槛的岗位。

findings.issue: 同一段经历里以使用级证据同时展开 Go、Python、Java、C++ 四种编程语言，容易被 HR 读成堆砌型炫技，而不是清晰的主责闭环。
findings.fix: 保留 1-2 个真正的主语言作为主线，其余语言只在确有明确职责时作为一次性集成/适配补充出现，避免每条 bullet 都拉满语言数量。

revision_priority: [MUST] 直面 3+ years non-internship 门槛：当前可见经历只有约 2.5 年，这份简历对该 JD 是结构性错配。
[MUST] 把 Summary 第一行改成直接的 ML/LLM 角色锚点，去掉“transitioning”式首屏叙事。
[SHOULD] 收敛 TikTok 段的编程语言密度，突出最核心的 1-2 门语言，避免堆砌感。
[NICE] 保持其余 ML / RAG / Bedrock 证据不变，但减少同类技术重复出现的频率。
raw_json.revision_instructions: [结构性错配] 这份简历对该 JD 的主要问题是 3+ years non-internship 硬门槛不足，无法通过局部改写彻底消除。保留“2.5+ years”这一真实表述，不要伪装成已满足年限；同时把 Summary 首句改成直接的 ML/LLM engineer 定位，并收敛 TikTok 段的语言堆砌，只保留最核心的主语言和最有说服力的系统证据。
